allow: PowerShell(@\('Admin@123','securePassword123','admin','admin123','Password123','password','Rivio@123'\) | ForEach-Object { $body = "{`"email`":`"admin@rivio.com`",`"password`":`"$_`"}"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://riviobackendspringboot-production.up.railway.app/api/auth/login' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body -TimeoutSec 15 -ErrorAction Stop; "OK with [$_] -> $\(\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4\)\)"; break } catch { "$_  -> $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" } })
